# Related Issue
Closes #ISSUE_NUMBER

# Summary
Provide a brief, high-level summary of the changes introduced by this pull request.

# Changes Made
- [ ] Detail major changes (e.g. backend files modified, frontend additions, workflow tasks)
- [ ] Detail minor changes

# Testing
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:
- Local test execution command (e.g. `pytest tests/ -v`)
- Visual layout verification (responsive widths checked: mobile, tablet, desktop)
- Lint/flake8 check status

# Screenshots / Demo
If applicable, add screenshots or videos demonstrating frontend layout changes or API output.

# Impact
Why is this contribution valuable? What does it improve?

# Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (PEP 8, ESLint, etc.)
- [ ] Test coverage added or updated for new code
- [ ] No secrets, passwords, or personal API keys committed
- [ ] Responsive design verified for UI changes
- [ ] Keyboard accessibility (A11y) verified
- [ ] Up-to-date with target branch and rebased
